commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all the days of his life. This had been remarked, chap. (Haydock) There was a domestic quarrel between the two families. (Calmet) Some suspect that Roboam is placed to designate his successors, or that we ought to read, Abia. (Sanchez) Castalion rashly ventures to alter the text. (Calmet) Abiam gained a decisive victory over Jeroboam, ver. , and 2 Paralipomenon xiii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
